report.summary: Audited crypto-debit-cards-guide-2026, bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide, and payfi-guide for UX/accessibility issues; created static OG images (1200x630 SVG+PNG) for both new guides; fixed PayFi breadcrumb accessibility, removed dangerouslySetInnerHTML from bitcoin treasury page, and added mobile table scroll fixes.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Added aria-label='Breadcrumb' and aria-hidden='true' on separator to PayFi guide breadcrumb nav for screen reader accessibility
Removed dangerouslySetInnerHTML from bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide 'Why Companies Buy BTC' section — replaced with safe JSX rendering to eliminate XSS risk
Fixed HTML entity rendering (' → Unicode curly apostrophe) in bitcoin treasury card body text after removing dangerouslySetInnerHTML
Added min-w-[480px] to bitcoin treasury top holders table for proper mobile horizontal scroll behavior
Switched crypto-debit-cards-guide-2026 OG from dynamic /api/og endpoint to static PNG for faster social card rendering and reliability
Switched bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide OG from dynamic /api/og endpoint to static PNG for faster social card rendering and reliability
Updated OG image alt text on both pages to be more descriptive for accessibility

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: crypto-debit-cards-2026 (1200x630) — SVG + PNG with green/blue gradient, 4 card comparison stat cards (Coinbase 4%, Crypto.com 8%, Bybit 10%, Gnosis Pay self-custody), payment flow diagram (Your Crypto → Auto-Convert → Visa/Mastercard → Merchant Paid), category tag pills (Visa, Mastercard, Cashback, Self-Custody)

OG image: bitcoin-treasury-companies (1200x630) — SVG + PNG with amber/orange BTC gradient, 4 stat cards (Strategy 687K BTC, 172+ companies, ~1M total BTC, Metaplanet 35K BTC), corporate treasury flow diagram (Raise Capital → Buy Bitcoin → Grow BTC/Share → NAV Premium), top holders tag pills

sections.title: Files Modified
items: src/app/learn/payfi-guide/page.tsx — Added aria-label='Breadcrumb' to nav, aria-hidden='true' to separator span
src/app/learn/bitcoin-treasury-companies-guide/page.tsx — Removed dangerouslySetInnerHTML, fixed apostrophe entities, added min-w-[480px] to holders table, switched to static OG image
src/app/learn/crypto-debit-cards-guide-2026/page.tsx — Switched to static OG image, updated alt text

sections.title: Files Created
items: public/og-crypto-debit-cards-2026.png — OG image PNG for social sharing
public/og-bitcoin-treasury-companies.png — OG image PNG for social sharing
